name: STEVEN MADDEN, LTD.
summary: Steven Madden, Ltd. is a footwear and accessories company that designs, sources, markets, and sells fashion-forward shoes, handbags, and accessories under owned and licensed brands. The company operates through wholesale and retail channels, serving consumers globally. Its portfolio includes owned brands and licensed products, with recent expansion via the acquisition of Kurt Geiger, a UK-based footwear and accessories brand.

products.name: Footwear
products.description: Fashion shoes and boots sold under owned and licensed brand names through wholesale and retail channels.

products.name: Handbags and Accessories
products.description: Fashion handbags and accessories marketed under owned and licensed brands globally.

products.name: Kurt Geiger Brand
products.description: UK-based footwear and accessories brand acquired by Steven Madden, sold globally.

partnerships.description: Acquired Kurt Geiger, a UK-based footwear and accessories brand, expanding international presence.
